judgment.summary: Shopify delivers strong revenue growth and robust free cash flow backed by a massive cash reserve.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS 0.36 beat the 0.33 estimate (8.6% surprise); next earnings date is 2026-08-05.
positives: Total cash $5.74B vs total debt $179M — massive net cash position.
Free cash flow (TTM) $1.26B — healthy cash generation.
negatives: Trailing P/E 99.50 — extremely high valuation relative to current earnings.
Price/Book 9.82 — high premium relative to book value.

news.paragraph: Shopify has seen its stock price slip 26% over the past month. There are no imminent catalysts such as earnings or regulatory actions mentioned in the recent news headlines. Traders should account for this recent downward momentum when evaluating potential option contracts.
